name: Buckwheat Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the yeast in 1 cup of water.
2. Add sugar, salt, 3 cups water, and sufficient buckwheat flour to make a thin batter. Cover and let rise overnight in a warm place.
3. In the morning, add baking soda dissolved in 1 tablespoon of cold water. Beat thoroughly.
4. Bake on a hot griddle.
5. Half a cup of the batter may be saved and used to start a second quantity of batter.
